## Summary

Describe what this PR cleans up or fixes.

## Type

- [ ] Repo layout cleanup
- [ ] Build fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Upstream sync
- [ ] Test/benchmark/tooling
- [ ] Other

## Validation

- [ ] `cargo xtask check-layout`
- [ ] `cargo xtask status`
- [ ] `cargo check`
- [ ] Windows repair was run, if relevant

## Notes

Mention any path rewrites, upstream package aliases, or Windows build changes.
